core_skills: JavaScript, TypeScript, Rust, Web application development, React
skill_match_scores: JavaScript:0.5, TypeScript:1.0, Rust:0.0, Web application development:1.0, React:1.0
must_have_quals: 2 years of professional software development experience, Proficiency in coding & scripting languages such as JavaScript, TypeScript, or Rust, Technical knowledge of Web application (React/Vue/Svelte) development, Good team communication and collaboration skills
preferred_quals: Advanced degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering or related technical field, Development experience with Rust toolkit development such as SWC, lightning CSS, Rspack and etc
core_responsibilities: Work closely with product teams to build innovative and performant web development toolkit, Design, implement, maintain and improve the architecture of Rspack, Rsbuild, Rstest etc, Analyze and optimize the compile performance, improve JavaScript bundle quality and efficiency, Carry out code reviews to ensure code quality
job_summary: ByteDance is a global technology company that inspires creativity and enriches life through innovative products. The Software Engineer, Cross Platform will focus on improving the usability, performance, and tooling experience of JavaScript development tools, while collaborating with product teams to build a performant web development toolkit.
